# Project Constitution

## Article 1 — Real article [CRITICAL]
**Rule:** R.
**Exception:** None.

Authoring guide — to add a new article, paste this template under the last article:

```
## Article 99 — Title goes here [CRITICAL]
**Rule:** State the rule.
**Exception:** None.
```

Inline example: a header looks like `## Article N — Title [LEVEL]`.
